title: NeoEats Domain Pack
summary: Inventory, recipe, receipt, order, and hot-offer orchestration for NeoEats grocery operations.
entrypoints: recipe from pantry inventory and user constraints
facts-first strict recipe from available inventory

intent_routes.notes: Run normalize -> generate -> validate in DRY_RUN/STUB before SANDBOXED publish.
Facts-first flow enforces inventory-backed ingredients and nutrition before validation; in LIVE mode source=db is required.

recommended_orchestration.name: inventory_check_then_recipe
recommended_orchestration.ordering_rule: neoeats.inventory.get -> neoeats.inventory.normalize -> neoeats.input.normalize -> (inventory_sync optional) -> neoeats.recipe.generate -> neoeats.recipe.validate

recommended_orchestration.name: inventory_strict_recipe
recommended_orchestration.ordering_rule: neoeats.inventory.get -> neoeats.inventory.normalize -> neoeats.input.normalize -> neoeats.recipe.generate -> neoeats.recipe.compile_strict -> neoeats.recipe.validate

safety_guidance: Recipe modules are local deterministic heuristics in DRY_RUN/STUB and perform no external calls.
Facts-first recipe flow must run compile_strict so recipe ingredients come only from inventory + approved staples.
If validation fails, attach suggestions and keep output marked as non-compliant; avoid implicit side effects.
Treat approval_block as the final policy gate for promotions.
Avoid modules with direct writes in unaudited drafts.
